programme.title: World of Watersports Ep307: Cliff Diving, Kitefoiling and Waterski Jumping
programme.desc: This WOW episode features Red Bull Cliff Diving in an underground lake in Romania's famous Turda salt mine; the European Kitefoil Championships in Spain; and the Moomba Masters men’s and women’s waterski jumping in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.title: Blue World Ep505: Mayan Underworld - Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Mexico’s Yucatan, Blue World explores remote cenotes in the jungle that were once used for Mayan rituals. Just reaching the surface of the water requires rappelling down from the forest above. But then, beneath the surface, we encounter strange alien life forms that live in total darkness, and the remains of humans and animal sacrifices from an ancient culture.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep406: Paddling Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Among the numerous islands and atolls of Papua New Guinea, Nikki Gregg experiences traditional festivals, charged canoe races and embarks on an exploratory trip down a remote river.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep111: Aquabike World Championship Series Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The Grand Prix of Portugal continues with a focus on the Aquabike Runabout Division.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep204: Ixtapa, Mexico
programme.desc: Segments include swimming with Dolphins; sea kayaking; the Zihuatanejo Market; exploring a Coconut Plantation; clay tile making; Las Brisas Ixtapa and live music at Bandidos.

programme.title: Airtime Ep55: Kayaking Norway…Romancing The Rapids
programme.desc: The swollen waterways of Norway’s backcountry provide the challenge as a group of world-class kayakers take on Class 5 whitewater in this adventure of a lifetime. These pros seek out the most difficult lines and spectacular waterfalls set against the wild beauty that's Norway.

programme.title: Xplash Ep109
programme.desc: Xplash brings you amazing action in, on, and near water. In this episode, we’ll fly high with kiteboarder Kevin Langeree; take a look at what's being done to progress the sport of Hydro Flight; and start things off by kayaking from the top of a snow-covered mountain.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep307: Cliff Diving, Kitefoiling and Waterski Jumping
programme.desc: This WOW episode features Red Bull Cliff Diving in an underground lake in Romania's famous Turda salt mine; the European Kitefoil Championships in Spain; and the Moomba Masters men’s and women’s waterski jumping in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.title: Blue World Ep505: Mayan Underworld - Yucatan, Mexico

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep406: Paddling Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Among the numerous islands and atolls of Papua New Guinea, Nikki Gregg experiences traditional festivals, charged canoe races and embarks on an exploratory trip down a remote river.

programme.title: Midlife Crisis Presents: Fast Forward
programme.desc: Midlife Crisis is back with Fast Forward. Featuring the age-defying shredders John Jackson, Blaise Rosenthal, Kevin Jones, Todd Richards, Chad Otterstrom, Daniel Franck, and more. We’re here for it, and so are you.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Isle Of Snow
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the snowboard world through the perspectives of the people who live it and have made it their lives follow their passions.

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Business Casual
programme.desc: Business Casual follows the Burton Snowboards crew and the Manboys as they enjoy the best part of the season in the Whistler area while Rusty Ockenden learns to operate a camera. The ManBoys crew encourages anyone who wants to get into the backcountry to take a first aid avalanche course with your whole crew. Be safe, have fun, learn from your mistakes - and learn from theirs. Featuring Jody Wachniak, Mark Sollors, Noah Cohen, Mikey Rencz, Matt Belzile, and Beau Bishop. Directed and edited by Rusty Ockenden

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Snowdance
programme.desc: Snowdance is a backcountry snowboarding film. Because even if you’ve never set foot in the backcountry, you can still be grateful that it’s there. Seven years and one pandemic since their fruition, The ManBoys roster still remains largely intact with Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Matt Belzile, Jody Wachniak, Beau Bishop Eric Jackson. Snowdance was filmed by Ben Webb, Connor Winton, Dave Craig, and Ryan Kenny.

programme.title: The Manboys Movie
programme.desc: The boys are back with new friends and a brand new snowboard film. The Manboys Movie will definitely top your expectations. Featuring bangers from Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Craig McMorris, Jody Wachniak, Matt Belzile, Anto Chamberland, and Mark Sollors.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Devun Walsh
programme.desc: Devun Walsh aka the GOAT. If only you could put into words the impact Devun has had on snowboarding. From his signature style, timeless tricks, mentorship, films, companies, attitude and his overall vision for our culture… and of course his ability to seek out and find new zones and features that till this day are the gold standard of professional backcountry riding. Truly one of the greats. Thanks for coming on boss. Enjoy!

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Horsewomen
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates three extraordinary horsewomen and the captivating connection they have with their equine friends. We showcase exhebition work from American dressage star Sabine Schut-Kery, experience life through a lens with Poland’s fine art horse photographer Katarzyna Okrzesik-Mikolajek, and witness the holistic approach to healing in South West England with renowned trainer Connie Cox.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 5: Heroes Healers
programme.desc: This week Ride exercises military precision with the mounts of the Household Cavalry at the British Army’s London Barracks, and sees second chances given to troubled residents at Achterhoek horse shelter in the Netherlands. We’re in the back seat with Polish driving expert Piotr Mazurek and catch up with this year’s Longines FEI Rising Star Award winner, Germany’s Greta Busacker.

Experience soothing music alongside vibrant coral reef fish, turtles, and other amazing underwater creatures. This compilation includes highlights from our five previous Red Sea Life videos, providing a calming escape for stress reduction and relaxation.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi R8 Spyder is the most extreme convertible by the German brand. Also: the Ferrari California T scores with Italian passion and elegant lines. And: AMG's GT C Roadster with its roaring sound is a real bad boy with a touch of luxury.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its Macan Turbo, Porsche sets the benchmark in the SUV segment. The optional performance package increases the output from 400 to 440 HP. A serious competitor bears the Maserati brand. With the Levante, die Italian carmaker wants to stir up the competitive market for sporty SUVs.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Harley-Davidson add three additions to their model range of bikes: the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, the versatile Switchback Dyna, and the bad-boy ride „Softail Slim“. Also: two German bikers take a dusty adventure ride through Mexico on their BMW's. And: the Triumph Speedmaster, the British answer to Harley-Davidson's cruiser.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The Blacktrail by PG Bikes is the fastest and lightest E-bike in the world, but also the most expensive. What's behind this exciting power package from Regensburg, Germany? Also: is BMW's new flagship bike, the K 1600 GT with 6 cylinders really worth its price and is it able to stand up to the competition by Honda, Kawasaki and Benelli?

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: Research facilities like Audi Bionics start to explore nature's versatility in order to use is as a foundation for new inventions. Also, the Volkswagen CC with Blue Motion technology and the Audi A8 Hybrid.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: More and more companies are working on vehicles that drive autonomously even in complex traffic conditions. Part 4 of this series on sustainable mobility focuses on how this development may change future traffic.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: After a design competition eight BMW models are shortlisted and presented to 500 test customers. A jury recommends two models for the finale and then the winner of the design contest will be announced and produced.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: With its length of up to 12 meters and its weight of 18 tons, the Performance by Volkner is the most extraordinary luxury motor home from Germany and one of the most exclusive caravans in the world.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took a look at Mercedes-Benz's first convertible model in their S-class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Nissan's all-wheel monster GT-R had to prove its winter suitability and the new Porsche 911 with turbo engine was taken to its limits in Finnish Lapland. Also: the Mercedes-Benz S 500 plug-in hybrid.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: For over 80 years the British county of Cheshire has been home to one of the most exclusive car manufacturers: Bentley Motors. At Bentley, however, traditionally not only luxury plays a role, but also performance.

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: A Day At DIBS
programme.desc: Dubai International Boat Show, the most trusted and established marine industry exhibition in the Middle East. Despite misconceptions claiming luxury yachts to be the main attraction in this event, the DIBS offer a much wider variety of expositions on nautical news, sports and lifestyle. It differs from other shows as it has a more exclusive clientele and many professionals of this world are yearning to come.You will adventure into one of Dubai’s most prestigious shows featuring the latest releases of yachts and boats from both local and international builders together with the innovations in marine equipment and accessories.Discover all its secret gems with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Death Mask
programme.desc: Wilbur works in an old carnival and shows some gruesome things to the puplic. He covered his face because he had a sadistic father who burned his face. Everybody makes jokes about his scars and when the new boss fired him, he go to an old swamp-witch who gives him a peace of wood from a hanging tree and Wilbur makes a mask from this piece of wood and put all his anger in this mask. When he puts the mask on, everybody who looks on this mask commits suicide. He has created the Death-Mask.

programme.title: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman out on the town with friends is saved from the clutches of a serial rapist by an ancient but gorgeous vampire, but at what cost?

programme.title: Exorcism in Utero
programme.desc: Herma finds a powerful ring that possesses her when she tries it on. As her body transforms and mind begins to deteriorate, she must find a way out to save herself and her unborn baby.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E03 - Chasing The Big One
programme.desc: Montana wardens spend a week tracking the killer of two out-of-season deer; anonymous tips and eye witness accounts keep the wardens hot on a trail filled with many twists and turns.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E04 - Buggying Out
programme.desc: Fourth of July weekend in Silver Lake State Park is a non-stop party; Michigan conservation officers help patrol the park during this busy time and make keeping the peace their number one priority.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S01:E02 - Return To The Moon
programme.desc: The Moon, our closest celestial companion. Our indispensible dance partner through the cosmos. Lighting our night sky and gently tugging at our shores. Few have walked on her surface, though her allure remains strong, once again we are glancing her way with reThe Newed interest and with a view to return very soon.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S01:E03 - The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between us and our Star, the inner worlds; hidden within the sun's glare often only visible at sunrise or sunset. Venus the first and brightest star in the evening sky, and Mercury fleeting across the solar disk. They are half of our solar system's terrestrial planets and yet as we look at our companions they are posing more questions than answers.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E07 - Uga Bay, Sri Lanka and Istanbul
programme.desc: The Luxury Travel Show heads to the idyllic resort of Uga Beach in Sri Lanka for some unusual fine dining locations, with tall tables in the swimming pool and dug-out sunken tables in the sand. Then it’s off to Istanbul with a stay in one of the city’s best hotels - which has been transformed from a derelict tobacco factory into a palace fit for royalty.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E08 - Grand Cayman and Toledo
programme.desc: Things hot up in this episode of The Luxury Travel Show as we head to the Caribbean island of Grand Cayman to a small town where visitors can literally send loved ones a postcard from Hell. The temperature dips only slightly in Toledo for a safari trip in Spain, with sunset drives, horse riding and clay pigeon shooting.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E13 - William And Kate One Year On
programme.desc: William and Catherine got married in a fairytale ceremony on April 29, 2011, with more than two billion people tuning in and celebrations happening all around the world.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E18 - The Queen Mother An Affectionate Tribute
programme.desc: The Queen Mother, who lived as long as the century itself, was a beloved figure in British life. She was a symbol of bravery during the Second World War and a timeless icon of steadiness, winning a deep affection from people that was only matched by the Queen herself.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Honey and Ashes

Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max piensa que Camila lo rechazó por Roberto. En confesión con el Padre Tiziano, le aconseja que le cuente toda la verdad a Max, pero ella teme que Roberto la denuncie por asesina. Julia y Gregorio vuelven a encontrarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila es atropellada por un desconocido que le advierte que deje de buscar a Rosa Blanco. Esto la inquieta y acude a Max pero el le dice que no lo involucre más en este asunto. Todos temen el regreso de Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Ezequiel se enfrentan por Camila. Astrid trata de manipular a Roberto para sacarle información a cambio de dinero. Max acusa a Camila de prostituta y decide sacarla de su vida. El regreso de Rosa Blanco es traumático.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max decide enfrentar a Roberto, y cede a la seducción de Astrid, pero no por amor sino por despecho. Durante una cena familiar, Ezequiel brinda por Octavia, pero expresa su intención de casarse con otra mujer. Camila sabe que su madre regresará.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila no entiende por qué su madre regresa para vengarse y el motivo de tanto odio. Madre Isabel, Padre Tiziano y Elda, guardan un cómplice silencio. Max enfrenta a Roberto y Camila reacciona con celos y rabia.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila miente sobre su relación con Roberto. Max está muy golpeado y esta situación la aprovecha Astrid que se le insinúa mucho, pero él la rechaza. Ezequiel humillando y maltratando a Leandro, su hijo enfermo.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Buenas Noches, Dijo La Señorita Pájaro
programme.desc: Un adulterio, un secreto familiar, un asesino en serie. Una historia fabricada con estructura de muñecas rusas y con ritmo de montañas rusas.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Baile Peligroso
programme.desc: Miluska es una cantante, que se gana la vida haciendo shows musicales para un hotel turístico en el sur de Perú. Durante las presentaciones conoce una variedad de empresarios de todo nivel, entre ellos está Don Mauro, un señor respetable, que admira mucho a Miluska, Carlos Reyes, un traficante de mujeres que se hace pasar por empresario. Al ser cliente frecuente del hotel se gana cierta confianza con las chicas, un día le ofrece a Miluska hacer un show para su hotel en otra provincia, pero no sabían que caerían en una trampa difícil de escapar.

programme.title: Codón Es Una Máquina
programme.desc: Dos amigos se reúnen para planear la creación de una película con un equipo de producción filmando el proceso, dos cuarentones con problemitas están muy decididos a hacer la famosa película de la que llevan años hablando. Se vienen tan arriba que hasta ya graban el making of... y hasta están haciendo un casting, aunque no tienen ni guión ni puñetera idea de lo que van a rodar. Y lo peor: no sospechan que están en las manos de un loco peligroso.

programme.title: El Mariachi Gringo
programme.desc: Comedia romántica sobre un joven de la América profunda que -tras tener como improvisado maestro de guitarra a un emigrante- viaja a México huyendo de su vida tediosa y de su familia, para ejercitarse como mariachi.

programme.title: Canon: Fidelidad al Límite
programme.desc: Mariana de 35 años, es una arquitecta que trabaja y es socia de un importante despacho de arquitectos, está casada con Julián de 40 años, quien es corresponsal de guerra. Está enamorados, felices, con relación sexual cotidiana. Son padre de dos hijos de 14 y 17 año. En el juego sexual, Julián menciona que no le importaría la infidelidad a condición de estar enterado del hecho con detalles.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.desc: En Martí Noticias News te traemos las últimas novedades globales, ofreciendo una cobertura y análisis en profundidad de los temas más apremiantes.
